metadata.description: EO MicroSaaS training marketplace — student-facing Claude Code plugin for the 7-pillar development workflow. Pair with EO-Brain (business brain) for full idea → shipped MVP pipeline.

plugins.name: eo-microsaas-dev
plugins.description: 7-pillar development workflow for EO students. 9 slash commands (/eo-guide, /eo-status, /eo-plan, /eo-code, /eo-review, /eo-score, /eo-bridge-gaps, /eo-ship, /eo-debug, /eo-retro) + 8 skills. 5-hat scoring with student calibration (90+ ship gate). Cross-session resumability via /eo-guide. MENA checks (Arabic RTL, mobile 375px), BRD traceability, elegance pause, lessons.md self-improvement. Dev-progress tracker dual-writer pattern. Native Windows PowerShell hooks. Calibrated for solo founder reality.
